steps.title: Find $2x$
steps.content: So $$2x=12.$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. Adding the second equation in the given system to the first equation in the given system yields $\left(x+3\right)+\left(x-3\right)=\left(-2y+5\right)+\left(2y+7\right)$. Adding like terms in this equation yields $2x=12$. Thus, the value of $2x$ is $12$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $y$, not $2x$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect. This is the value of $x$, not $2x$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.
